summary: Work Orders Tab tested successfully. All core features working: (1) Work Orders tab exists, old 'Labours'/'Labour Count' tabs removed, (2) Contractor list shows assigned contractors with type, WO count, active stages, total amount, (3) Clicking contractor shows back button + stage timeline, (4) Completed stages greyed out with 'Payment Released' badge, active stages with 'Active' badge, (5) Stages show name, amount, daily rate, date range, spend progress bar, (6) Expanded stages show Daily Attendance/Request Payment buttons + attendance log table, (7) Daily Attendance popup with date picker, employee count, auto-calculated cost working correctly, (8) Request Payment popup with stage amount/spend/balance/amount input working, (9) Backend APIs: GET assigned-contractors returns contractors with work_orders and payment_stages, POST attendance creates record and updates stage spend, PATCH request-payment changes status to 'requested', multi-step approval flow working (procurement -> planning -> accountant), (10) Duplicate attendance rejected correctly.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) hit during rapid test runs - expected behavior

issues:

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed - 1 error due to rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI features verified: Work Orders tab, contractor list, stage timeline, Daily Attendance popup, Request Payment popup, attendance log table, progress bars, status badges)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: cont_mason01 (Raju Masonry Works - 3 stages, 1 approved), cont_paint01 (Kumar Painters - 3 stages, all pending), cont_elec01 (Selvam Electricals - 2 stages, 1 requested)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Orders feature fully functional. All 13 test features verified: Work Orders tab exists, old tabs removed, contractor list displays correctly, stage timeline with badges (Active/Payment Released), stage details (amount, rate, dates, progress), expanded view with buttons and attendance log, Daily Attendance popup with auto-calculation, Request Payment popup, backend APIs all working. Minor HTML nesting warning in SiteEngineerProject.jsx but doesn't affect functionality.

work_orders_tab_exists.note: Tab visible between Materials and Stock Register

contractor_list.note: Shows 4 contractors with type, WO count, active stages, total amount

contractor_click_shows_stages.note: Back button and stage timeline visible

completed_stages_greyed_out.note: 'Payment Released' badge and opacity-50 class applied

stage_details.note: Name, amount, daily rate, date range, spend progress bar all displayed

expanded_stage_buttons.note: Daily Attendance and Request Payment buttons visible for pending stages

attendance_log_table.note: Table shows Date, Workers, Cost columns with totals

payment_popup.note: Shows stage amount, spend, balance, amount input, notes textarea

backend_assigned_contractors_api.note: GET /api/projects/{id}/assigned-contractors returns contractors with work_orders array

backend_attendance_api.note: POST /api/labour-attendance creates record and updates stage total_spend

backend_multi_step_approval.note: Procurement -> Planning -> Accountant approval flow working

backend_duplicate_attendance_rejection.note: Same date+stage attendance rejected with 400 error
